message:
fix(approval): fix TestExpireStale flaky test root cause

The test was failing because ListPendingApprovals() filters OUT expired
approvals (WHERE expires_at > now), so ExpireStale() never saw them.

Changes:
- Add ListExpiredPendingApprovals() to query pending approvals that
  have already expired (WHERE expires_at <= now)
- Update ExpireStale() to use the new function
- Fix time comparison to use UTC consistently (approvals are created
  with time.Now().UTC() but queries were using time.Now())
- Minor README formatting improvements

The previous timing fixes (500ms/1s) were treating the symptom, not the
root cause. This fix addresses the actual bug.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
